title: Dividend Champion, Contender, And Challenger Highlights: Week Of April 30
text: A weekly summary of dividend activity for Dividend Champions, Contenders, and Challengers. Companies which changed their dividends.

title: Entergy's (ETR) Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates, Revenues Rise Y/Y
text: Entergy's (ETR) Q1 revenues of $2,981.1 million surpass the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 6.4%. The figure also increases 3.6% from that reported in the year-ago quarter.

title: Entergy (ETR) Q1 Earnings Lag Estimates
text: Entergy (ETR) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.14 per share, missing the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.34 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.32 per share a year ago.

title: Entergy: This Renewable-Focused Utility Could Be Worthy Of Purchase Today
text: Entergy: This Renewable-Focused Utility Could Be Worthy Of Purchase Today.

title: Entergy to report first-quarter 2023 financial results on April 26
text: NEW ORLEANS , April 19, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Entergy will report its first-quarter 2023 financial results before the market opens Wednesday, April 26. Drew Marsh, chairman and chief executive officer, Kimberly Fontan, executive vice president and chief financial officer, and company leaders invite you to listen to a live webcast discussion of Entergy's financial results at 10 a.m.
